articles.lead_en: Boris Titov, presidential special representative for relations with international organizations to achieve Sustainable Development Goals, said the program is currently not among US priorities, but US authorities acknowledge the existence of transboundary challenges

articles.title_en: Support grows in Germany for talks with Russia
articles.lead_en: According to sources cited by The Times, Ronald Pofalla, former head of the German Federal Chancellery, could act as an intermediary between Moscow and Berlin
